I don't have breaking news to report that matches your query criteria. The search results contain game recaps from April 20-21, 2026 (Sunday's Mavericks-Lakers game), but no new announcements or confirmed developments that would move prediction markets.

signals.headline: Cooper Flagg's Performance:** Flagg scored 45 points with 9 assists and 8 rebounds in Dallas's 134-128 win over Los Ange
signals.raw: Cooper Flagg's Performance:** Flagg scored 45 points with 9 assists and 8 rebounds in Dallas's 134-128 win over Los Angeles on Sunday[1][2]. This followed his 51-point performance on Friday, making him the first rookie since Allen Iverson to record back-to-back 40-point games[2][5].
matched_markets: Will Cooper Flagg win the 2025–26 NBA Rookie of the Year award?

signals.headline: Playoff Status:** The Mavericks remain eliminated from playoff contention (currently 25-53)[1][2], and the Lakers (50-28
signals.raw: Playoff Status:** The Mavericks remain eliminated from playoff contention (currently 25-53)[1][2], and the Lakers (50-28) are still in the playoff picture despite injuries to key players like Luka Dončić and Austin Reaves[5].

signals.raw:
Rookie of the Year Race:** Flagg is competing against Duke teammate Kon Knueppel for the award[2], though no official decision has been announced in these results.

signals.headline: Elon Musk # Tweets April 14-21, 2026 Market Hits 100% on 220-239 Range | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk # Tweets April 14-21, 2026 Market Hits 100% on 220-239 Range | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Polymarket's most active market as of April 20-21, 2026, now prices the 220-239 tweet count outcome at 100%, up from 70% earlier, signaling trader consensus amid the week's close (market ends April 21).[1][2][3]  
This reflects real-time sentiment shifts from new data or events, with over $28M total
